dismissalText.commentary: Yashasvi Jaiswal b Rabada 55 (36b 6x4 3x6 61m) SR: 152.77

dismissalComment.html: off stump thumped, and Rabada has the last laugh! On a length and zoning into off stump. Jaiswal backs away, with designs to go inside-out. Comfortably late on the stroke, though, and the ball whistles past the bat before leaving off stump in a mess. Another tone-setting knock by Jaiswal comes to an end!

dismissalText.commentary: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Phillips b Rashid Khan 31 (18b 5x4 1x6 35m) SR: 172.22

dismissalComment.html: miscued and Sooryavanshi is outta here! Rashid with the breakthrough! Back of a length on middle and leg, and this seems to just stick in the surface. Sooryavanshi has a slog at it but does not get it well enough. Picks out Phillips to perfection at deep mid wicket, and the Kiwi was not dropping that - not in a million years. GT with a vital, vital wicket!

dismissalText.commentary: Dhruv Jurel c †Buttler b Mohammed Siraj 75 (42b 5x4 5x6 71m) SR: 178.57

dismissalComment.html: banged in much shorter outside off, and Jurel nicks it through! Looks for the same stroke, trying to upper-cut it over the bowler. This, though, has just enough kick on it to make the shot untenable. A bit of a variation too and that lack of pace means Jurel only finds Buttler with his effort. A brilliant knock but someone else will need to take RR close to 210 now!

dismissalText.commentary: Riyan Parag c Kushagra b Prasidh Krishna 8 (4b 0x4 1x6 4m) SR: 200

dismissalComment.html: catching practice this time, and RR losing their way a little now! Seems like a change-up, on a length outside off. Parag does not quite pick it, and the ball stops in the surface too, further compounding the RR skipper's woes. Plonks it towards backward point, where Kushagra does just enough to cling on. Parag disappointed; GT have a foothold!

dismissalText.long: c Mohammed Siraj b Ashok Sharma
dismissalText.commentary: Shimron Hetmyer c Mohammed Siraj b Ashok Sharma 18 (8b 1x4 2x6 14m) SR: 225

dismissalComment.html: flat and straight to Siraj at long on! Ashok with another timely wicket! Full outside off and Hetmyer's eyes light up. He clears his front leg and swings hard at it. Gets a good chunk of it but not enough elevation. Siraj shimmies to his left and gobbles up the chance smartly to his left. GT keep chipping away!

dismissalComment.html: oh dear lord - what are the Titans doing?! This is an implosion and then some! Hung up full and wide. Rashid cracks it past extra cover. The two is on but Shahrukh thinks the third might be as well. Not the wisest of calls ot take on Jadeja, though. Not this season. Not in any season. Shahrukh has to scramble to the batter's end and is still well short. Jadeja with a moment of customary fielding magic, and GT are reeling now!
